status: 协议族: {family}  SDK: {sdk}  焦点: {focus}  事务: {transactions}  已保存: {saved}  窗口: {window_start}-{window_end}  历史: {history}  采集: {recording}  输入: {input}  选中: {selected}  运行: {uptime}秒

transactions.template: 按键: tab=切换窗口  q=退出  {space}  c=清空  up/down=滚动  page up/down=翻页  home/end=跳转
